properties.titulo_evento: Rubio ratchets up pressure on NATO at key summit
properties.descricao: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is casting new doubt on NATO's relevance after key allies recoiled from backing Washington’s “Operation Epic Fury.”

properties.titulo_evento: Taiwan says it has not been told by US of arms sales delays
properties.descricao: U.S. President Donald Trump said following a summit with China’s Xi Jinping in Beijing last week that he was undecided on whether to approve it.

properties.titulo_evento: In shift, Trump announces deployment of 5,000 US troops to Poland
properties.descricao: A week after cancelling a U.S. Army deployment to Poland, Trump announces an additional 5,000 troops will be sent to the country.

properties.titulo_evento: Poland joins Pentagon’s counter-drone marketplace amid unexpected US deployment cancellation
properties.descricao: The Army is continuing to expand military cooperation with Poland through the Pentagon’s counter-drone initiative, the service announced on Wednesday.

properties.titulo_evento: The Kid Rock Flyby Controversy and the Erosion of Military Professionalism
properties.descricao: During Congressional testimony from Department of Defense leadership last week, Representative George Whitesides asked Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, “How does canceling a command-initiated review support a culture of accountability?R...

properties.titulo_evento: Zelenskyy says ‘time is right’ for Ukraine to start process of joining EU
properties.descricao: His comments come as both Kyiv and Moscow try to advance their interests on the battlefield.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel attacks southern Lebanon and near Syrian border despite ‘ceasefire’
properties.descricao: People in southern Lebanon are living under "psychological terror" from Israeli air attacks and displacement orders.

properties.titulo_evento: Mexico beat Ghana as World Cup cohosts excel despite FIFA sanctions
properties.descricao: Parts of the Puebla stadium for high-profile warm-up for 2026 edition were closed to spectators due to FIFA sanctions.

properties.titulo_evento: Not just the US: India to Brazil, 51 nations armed Israel amid Gaza war
properties.descricao: Despite ICJ genocide warnings, 51 nations kept arming Israel, even after pledging to halt support.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war day 85: Tehran says major gaps remain in US talks
properties.descricao: Pakistan army chief Asim Munir arrives in Tehran as mediation efforts to secure a US-Iran peace deal intensify.

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli forces attack central Gaza despite ceasefire agreement
properties.descricao: Video shows the moment Israeli forces struck Nuseirat and Bureij refugee camps in central Gaza, injuring dozens.

properties.titulo_evento: Some fear US-Philippines war games are drawing conflict closer to home
properties.descricao: Critics of US, Philippine military cooperation say closely aligning with Washington makes Manila a possible target.

properties.titulo_evento: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
properties.descricao: Ukraine says it struck Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied region.

properties.titulo_evento: Rubio visits India to sell energy as Iran oil shock persists
properties.descricao: The top US diplomat has made statements offering to support India’s energy needs - but should Delhi give in?

properties.titulo_evento: Rubio tries to reassure Nato allies over US troop deployments
properties.descricao: President Donald Trump says he wants to send more troops to Poland, a week after his officials cancelled a similar deployment.

properties.titulo_evento: Carney says Alberta is 'essential' to Canada as province plans vote on separation
properties.descricao: Alberta's decision to hold a referendum on separation has been widely criticised, including by separatists who say the question is not definitive enough.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump is putting pressure on Cuba - why and to what end?
properties.descricao: The US has warned that a peaceful agreement with Cuba is unlikely, Havana insists this is a "fraudulent case" designed to justify military intervention.

properties.titulo_evento: Mexico, EU sign stalled trade deal as they aim to diversify from US
properties.descricao: Mexico and the European Union signed a long-stalled free trade agreement on Friday as they seek to decrease dependence on the U.S. and partially insulate themselves from ​U.S. President Donald ‌Trump's tariffs.

properties.titulo_evento: War in the Middle East: US-Iran talks make headway
properties.descricao: Anahita Motazed Rad, Associate Fellow at the London School of Economics, is our guest.

properties.titulo_evento: Activists allege Israeli sexual assault: Israeli officials deny accusations
properties.descricao: Adrien Berthel, Activist at Global Sumud France, is our guest.

properties.titulo_evento: Middle East war live: Iran considers latest peace proposal, accuses US of 'excessive demands'
properties.descricao: Tehran accused the United States of "excessive demands", Iranian media reported on Saturday, as US media reports suggested that Washington was mulling new strikes while Iran was considering the latest peace proposal. Read our liveblog for all the la...

properties.titulo_evento: Rubio begins India visit to bolser ties after Trump's China summit
properties.descricao: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio began a high-profile visit to India on Saturday for talks with Prime Minister Narendra Modi aimed at reinforcing ties days after President Donald Trump’s closely watched summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

properties.titulo_evento: Rubio urges more support from NATO allies to help end Iran war
properties.descricao: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio urged more support for US efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, relaying Trump's "disappointment" at NATO allies and European partners for failing to step up their efforts to end the Iran war.  Rubio made the comm...

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Germany marks Constitution Day
properties.descricao: Germany is commemorating the day its Basic Law came into effect 77 years ago. And a record number of German passports was issued in 2025, a media report says. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: China: Dozens dead in coal mine blast — state media
properties.descricao: An explosion in a coal mine in northern China has killed at least 82 people, with some still unaccounted for, state media say. President Xi Jinping has demanded an "all-out" effort to search for and rescue those missing.

properties.titulo_evento: EU, Mexico sign expanded trade deal
properties.descricao: The updated accord between the European Union and Mexico removes most remaining barriers to trade and investment. President Sheinbaum said Mexico's respective trade deals with the EU and the US were "not contradictory."

properties.titulo_evento: New alliances emerge in Middle East — which one will 'win'?
properties.descricao: The UAE and Israel are getting closer, while Saudi Arabia is enhancing cooperation with Egypt, Turkey and Pakistan. The new alliances represent a rift in the Gulf, as approaches to the Iran war and the region diverge.

properties.titulo_evento: US or Iran: Who will win the Hormuz endurance game?
properties.descricao: Tehran is betting that its sanctions‑hardened economy can outlast the Strait of Hormuz crisis. Washington, meanwhile, is contending with elevated oil prices, renewed inflation pressure and rising global recession risks.

properties.titulo_evento: US: Tulsi Gabbard resigns as Trump's intelligence chief
properties.descricao: Tulsi Gabbard has resigned as head of US intelligence, citing her husband's recent cancer diagnosis. An opponent of foreign US interventions, Gabbard has sought to distance herself from the US-Israeli war on Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: EU reportedly nixes UK pitch for single market in goods
properties.descricao: The proposal comes as Britain’s embattled prime minister has vowed to put his country at the heart of Europe again.

properties.titulo_evento: Sweden backs Ukraine’s path to NATO, defense minister says
properties.descricao: Sweden’s Defense Minister Pål Jonson said Kyiv’s battle-tested army and fast-growing defense industry would strengthen the alliance, even as some NATO members remain opposed.

properties.titulo_evento: Magyar to visit Brussels next week to discuss unfreezing funds for Hungary
properties.descricao: Hungarian Foreign Minister Anita Orbán said several days of talks with Brussels over the frozen funds had already taken place at expert level in recent days.

properties.titulo_evento: Cable: US-Polish troop fracas due partly to bad US messaging
properties.descricao: U.S. President Donald Trump reversed the decision not to deploy troops to Poland, but the fallout has been severe.

properties.titulo_evento: Merz, Meloni and allies castigate Israel over West Bank settler violence
properties.descricao: “The policies and practices of the Israeli government, including a further entrenchment of Israeli control, are undermining stability and prospects for a two-state solution,” top European leaders warned.

properties.titulo_evento: Analysis-India's job engine strains as Iran war hits remittances and trade
Stocks Gain for 8th Week Amid Impasse Over Reopening Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Nearly three months since the fighting began, disagreements remain over the fate of Iran’s uranium stockpile and transit fees for the Strait of Hormuz.

properties.titulo_evento: Asian Currencies Hit by Iran War, Adding to Economic Strain
properties.descricao: Soaring oil prices and a surging dollar are testing Asia’s foreign-exchange reserves, which were built up after the 1997 crisis.

properties.titulo_evento: Mortgage Rates, Now 6.5%, Hit Highest Level Since War Began
properties.descricao: The average rate on a 30-year mortgage rose amid growing concerns over inflation and as the war with Iran showed no sign of ending.
